what: Compile audit findings into structured result
why: Aggregate all audit step findings into a single actionable report

output.console: Final audit report with overall pass/fail, score, and itemized findings

success_handling.criteria: Audit result is compiled with all findings from previous steps, overall pass/fail status determined, and score calculated

error_handling.criteria: Unable to compile findings from previous steps into a structured result
error_handling.action: Return partial result with available findings, log compilation error

event.message: Failed to compile audit result for entry {entry_id}: {error}

decisions.outcome: Knowledge audit flow complete, return structured result to caller
Return partial result with available data
